_meta.description: OPO mapping for TransPlan — all 248 SRTR centers mapped to OPOs via HRSA county data
_meta.source: HRSA Organ Donation and Transplantation Data (county-to-OPO) + FCC Census Area API (center lat/lon to county FIPS)
_meta.note: Center-to-OPO assignments are authoritative, based on HRSA county-level OPO service areas. Each center is mapped to the OPO serving the county where the center is located (via FCC Census Area API for lat/lon → county FIPS lookup).
